title: Debt Entry Schema
description: JSON Schema for production debt entries in the QGSD debt ledger

id.description: UUID v4 or deterministic hash-based ID

occurrences.description: Number of times this debt has been observed

first_seen.description: ISO8601 timestamp when debt was first observed

last_seen.description: ISO8601 timestamp when debt was last observed

environments.description: List of environments where debt has been observed

status.description: Current status in the state machine

formal_ref.description: Optional link to formal model: 'MCsafety.cfg:MaxDeliberation' or 'requirement:DEBT-01' or null

source_id.description: Identifier within source system (e.g., gh-123, sentry-abc)

observed_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when source observation occurred

source_entries.description: Array of source observations that triggered this debt entry

formal_ref_source.description: Source of formal_ref assignment: manual, auto-detect, spec-inferred, or null if unlinked

resolved_at.description: Optional ISO8601 timestamp when debt was marked as resolved
